metadata.description: AWS service skills for Git-Ape — 21 skills covering Lambda, S3, EC2, ECS, EKS, DynamoDB, IAM, CloudFormation, API Gateway, Bedrock, and more. Install to extend Git-Ape with full AWS resource management capabilities.

plugins.name: git-ape-aws-skills
plugins.description: AWS service skills plugin — compute, storage, databases, networking, security, messaging, AI, and cost estimation for AWS resources.

skills.name: aws-api-gateway
skills.description: AWS API Gateway for REST and HTTP API management

skills.name: aws-bedrock
skills.description: AWS Bedrock foundation models for generative AI

skills.name: aws-cloudformation
skills.description: AWS CloudFormation infrastructure as code for stack management

skills.name: aws-cloudwatch
skills.description: AWS CloudWatch monitoring for logs, metrics, alarms, and dashboards

skills.name: aws-cognito
skills.description: AWS Cognito user authentication and authorization

skills.name: aws-cost-estimator
skills.description: Estimate monthly costs for AWS resources using the AWS Pricing API

skills.name: aws-dynamodb
skills.description: AWS DynamoDB NoSQL database for scalable data storage

skills.name: aws-ec2
skills.description: AWS EC2 virtual machine management for instances, AMIs, and networking

skills.name: aws-ecs
skills.description: AWS ECS container orchestration for running Docker containers

skills.name: aws-eks
skills.description: AWS EKS Kubernetes management for clusters, node groups, and workloads

skills.name: aws-eventbridge
skills.description: AWS EventBridge serverless event bus for event-driven architectures

skills.name: aws-iam
skills.description: AWS Identity and Access Management for users, roles, policies, and permissions

skills.name: aws-lambda
skills.description: AWS Lambda serverless functions for event-driven compute

skills.name: aws-naming-research
skills.description: Research AWS resource naming conventions and constraints

skills.name: aws-rds
skills.description: AWS RDS relational database service for managed databases

skills.name: aws-s3
skills.description: AWS S3 object storage for bucket management and access control

skills.name: aws-secrets-manager
skills.description: AWS Secrets Manager for secure secret storage and rotation

skills.name: aws-security-analyzer
skills.description: Analyze CloudFormation templates against security best practices

skills.name: aws-sns
skills.description: AWS SNS notification service for pub/sub messaging

skills.name: aws-sqs
skills.description: AWS SQS message queue service for decoupled architectures

skills.name: aws-step-functions
skills.description: AWS Step Functions workflow orchestration with state machines
